column2: Description
(Official Tooltip) To enable meal nudge flow for meal booking.
The master toggle for the entire Desk/Seat Booking module on the app and web.
Allows different employees to book the same physical seat at different times of the day (e.g., morning shift vs. evening shift).
Master switch to enable "Work From Home" logging and requests.
Triggers an automated calendar invite (.ics) to the user's email upon booking a seat.
The deadline (in hours/mins) before a shift starts where an employee can no longer cancel their booking.
Populates the dropdown options users see when asked "Why are you coming to the office?" (e.g., Meeting, Demo, Support).
Enables users to book seats days or weeks in advance, rather than just same-day.
Allows employees to book desks on dates designated as official company holidays.
Blocks a user from declaring "Work From Office" if the floor plan is at 100% capacity.
The system automatically assigns a desk to an employee based on their team zone if they don't pick one manually.
Requires a physical check-in mechanism to confirm the user actually arrived at their desk.
Dictates what happens if a user doesn't check in (e.g., REMOVE_SEAT frees it up for someone else).
Buffer time allowed between an external check-in (like badging at the turnstile) and the system confirming the desk booking.
Forces a user to select a specific physical desk in order to complete a "Work From Office" request.
The maximum duration of a single booking (e.g., 1440 minutes = 24 hours).
Prevents an employee from booking both a Work From Home day and a Work From Office desk on the exact same date.
Marks an employee as a "No Show" if they fail to check in within this many hours of their shift start.
If a manager or SPOC books a seat on behalf of an employee, it counts towards that employee's daily/weekly quota limits.
Seat or WFH bookings go into a "Pending" status and require manager/admin approval.
Bypasses the manual approval flow, instantly confirming user requests.
Automatically cancels a booking and frees the desk if the user hasn't checked in within X minutes of their start time.
Caps the maximum number of WFH days an employee is allowed to request per week or month.
A health-safety compliance rule that prevents booking if the user's profile lacks vaccination approval.
Blocks a recently used seat from being booked back-to-back until cleaning staff marks it as sanitized.
Automatically checks the employee out of their desk X minutes after their scheduled shift ends.
Controls which global attendance tags (e.g., WFO, WFH) are active and selectable by users.
How many minutes before a shift starts that an employee is allowed to scan the desk QR code to check in.
How many minutes after a shift starts the QR code remains valid for check-in before the desk is forfeited.
Allows users working overnight shifts to have their check-out time roll over into the next calendar day.
